source_specific_inclusion_rules.benchmark_union: Union the frozen benchmark solely to guarantee later evaluation coverage.
source_specific_inclusion_rules.resistance_axis: Include the explicit example-gene records in configs/resistance_axes.yaml without using dependency outcomes.

exclusion_rules: No DepMap outcome, profile, score, rank, benchmark outcome, or holdout label may select membership.
limitations: Current repository curation is below the intended 300-1000 discovery-gene range.
Expansion requires separately reviewed pre-DepMap source records.
